content: Orchestrator, re-read ddec42d1's 00-deps.json: domain cto, resolved planner/maker/checker/reflector, domain_scope_path set, but no 00-frame.json was ever written -- per .clinerules Article 1 this trail was never 'active' in the first place.

Original true_intent (from the user's /orchestrator:run-cycle cto command that created ddec42d1) had 3 items: (a) fix relative/dot-dot-dot paths in orchestrator-role/SKILL.md to use <repo_path>/.agents/rules/ form and standardize the Usage contract, (b) mandate Linguistic Hand-offs in the Orchestrator's role instructions, (c) create brief-session.md as the Round Table player.

Check current state of each item against what's actually on disk before assuming supersession: (a) re-read orchestrator-role/SKILL.md's Usage section and confirm it already uses <repo_path>/.agents/rules/ form and matches run-cycle.md's contract; (b) confirm Linguistic Chain of Custody section exists (added in ceo/fe7be6ff); (c) confirm brief-session.md exists and has Round Table logic.

If all three are confirmed done elsewhere, this trail's intent is fully superseded and it should not be resumed -- delete the dangling .pmcro/trails/cto/ddec42d1-.../ directory (never committed to git, never sealed, not an 'active' trail per Article 1) rather than writing a frame/plan for work already completed.
